{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.protection_relay_type",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "microprocessor-based numerical",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Protection relays shall be microprocessor-based numerical type with overcurrent, earth fault, and under/over voltage functions."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.protection_relay_function_overcurrent",
      "operator": "exists",
      "value": null,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Protection relays shall be microprocessor-based numerical type with overcurrent, earth fault, and under/over voltage functions."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.protection_relay_function_earth_fault",
      "operator": "exists",
      "value": null,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Protection relays shall be microprocessor-based numerical type with overcurrent, earth fault, and under/over voltage functions."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.protection_relay_function_under_over_voltage",
      "operator": "exists",
      "value": null,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Protection relays shall be microprocessor-based numerical type with overcurrent, earth fault, and under/over voltage functions."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.relay_communication_protocol",
      "operator": "==",

      "quote": "Relay communications shall be IEC 61850 compatible."
    }
  ]
}
